lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there. What brings you here?

lines.speaker: Horphis
lines.text: I am researching the Dark Altar. Many of our forefathers spent their lives studying it, though much knowledge was lost over the generations.

lines.speaker: Horphis
lines.text: I believe some of their writings would have been stored in this Library, though the Librarian seems unable to help me locate any.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well good luck in your search.

lines.speaker: Horphis
lines.text: Excuse me, I do not believe we have any business.

lines.speaker: Horphis
lines.text: I wonder, traveller... Could you assist me?

lines.speaker: Horphis
lines.text: I am researching the Dark Altar. Many of our forefathers spent their lives studying it, though much knowledge was lost over the generations.

lines.speaker: Horphis
lines.text: I believe many of their writings would have been stored in this Library, though the Librarian seems unable to help me locate any.

lines.speaker: Horphis
lines.text: In your exploration of the Library, if you should happen to find any manuscripts of this nature, please bring them to me, and you will gain my gratitude.

sections.title: Talking to Horphis after asking to help

lines.speaker: Horphis
lines.text: Do you have any dark manuscripts for me, traveller?

lines.speaker: Horphis
lines.text: Our forefathers studied the Dark Altar for generations. I am sure their knowledge is stored in this Library somewhere. It is a shame that the Librarian seems unable to help me.

lines.speaker: Horphis
lines.text: Thank you very much. In return, I have given you some knowledge that you may perhaps appreciate.
